title: Special Purpose Machine (SPM) Development
description: We design and develop customized machines tailored to specific industrial requirements, improving productivity and reducing manual dependency.
techStack: CAD design | SolidWorks | Fixture and SPM design

title: Machine Integration & Automation
description: We integrate new automation systems with existing machines, enabling seamless operation and improved efficiency without replacing entire setups.
techStack: Universal Robots (UR series) | Pick & place automation systems | Machine tending solutions | Modbus (RTU / TCP) | Ethernet-based communication

title: PLC Programming & Control Systems
description: We provide PLC programming and control solutions for both new and existing machines
extendedDescription: Our AI models feed directly off edge-sensor data, dynamically shifting logic loops on the fly. This prevents physical breakdowns before they happen by detecting microscopic anomalies in torque and temperature.
techStack: Siemens (S7 series) | ABB | Delta | Flexem | HMI development & control logic design

title: Machine Retrofitting & Upgradation
description: We upgrade old machines with modern control systems, sensors, and design improvements to enhance performance, safety, and reliability
techStack: Control panel design | Sensor integration | Safety systems implementation

title: Machine Vision & Quality Inspection
description: We develop intelligent inspection systems using computer vision to detect defects and ensure consistent product quality.
techStack: NVIDIA-based processing systems | Industrial cameras (Intel / USB / GigE) | OpenCV-based image processing | Defect detection & inspection systems
